title: Spicy Chicken Biryani
description: A delicious Indian-inspired dish, made with marinated chicken and flavorful spices. This easy-to-make biryani is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the cumin, coriander, turmeric, red chili powder, and salt. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the basmati rice and stir to combine with the spices.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the biryani with a fork and serve hot.
